_description: Synthetic Inferno Drainer-style drain. Single token (USDC). A1 signal fires on known-drainer address match. Drainer address sourced from Scam Sniffer 2023-12-23 disclosure seed list (placeholder; verify Sprint 19). USDC amount = 5,000 USDC (5_000_000_000 raw, 6 decimals → $5,000 USD estimated). Expected confidence = 0.70 (A1 only). Severity::High.
_source: Synthetic — mimics Inferno Drainer tx pattern documented in Scam Sniffer 2023-12-23 disclosure. Token = USDC mainnet. Drainer address = known cluster seed (placeholder). Real Inferno drain tx hashes are documented in SlowMist Monthly Reports 2023 and require Sprint 19 ADR 0003 carve-out fixture capture.
_adr_note: ADR 0003 carve-out: this synthetic fixture was constructed from documented attack pattern without requiring a live RPC call. Sprint 19 will replace with real captured tx data.
